rules.description: Order type must be one of NEW, DIS (disconnect), or MOD (modify)
rules.effect: REJECT with E011 if order_type not in ('NEW', 'DIS', 'MOD')

rules.description: Account must exist in account master file
rules.effect: REJECT with E001 if account not found

rules.description: Closed accounts cannot place any orders
Suspended accounts can only place disconnect orders
rules.effect: REJECT with E003 if account_status = 'SUS' and order_type != 'DIS'

rules.description: Accounts with past-due balance exceeding $500 are blocked unless Platinum tier
rules.effect: REJECT with E005 if past_due > 500.00 and tier != 'P'
rules.implicit_reason: The $500 threshold is defined as a constant, and the Platinum exemption is only apparent from the nested IF structure

rules.description: Product must exist in inventory for NEW and MOD orders
rules.effect: REJECT with E006 if product not found (only for NEW/MOD)
REJECT with E012 if product status = 'D'

rules.description: Order quantity must be within product min/max range
rules.effect: REJECT with E008 if quantity < min or quantity > max
REJECT with E007 if quantity > (available_qty - reserved_qty) or product not in 'A' status
rules.implicit_reason: Available stock is calculated as available_qty minus reserved_qty, which is not obvious from variable names alone

rules.description: Discount percentage limited by account tier: Standard 15%, Gold 25%, Platinum 35%
rules.effect: REJECT with E009 if discount exceeds tier limit
rules.implicit_reason: Discount limits are defined as separate constants and the tier-to-limit mapping is spread across an EVALUATE block

rules.description: Rush priority (S) silently downgraded to Normal (N) for non-Gold/Platinum accounts
rules.effect: If priority = 'S' and tier not in ('P', 'G'), change priority to 'N'
rules.implicit_reason: No error is raised — the system silently modifies the priority, which is a hidden business rule

rules.description: Due date must be in the future (after order date); same-day only for Platinum rush orders
rules.effect: REJECT with E010 if due_date < order_date, or due_date = order_date unless (priority = 'S' and tier = 'P'). Due date validation skipped for disconnect orders.
rules.implicit_reason: The same-day exception for Platinum rush orders is buried in a nested conditional, and the disconnect exemption is controlled by the calling paragraph

constraints.description: Order total equals (quantity * unit_price) - discount + tax
Tax amount is zero for government accounts (region = GOVT)
Disconnect orders have zero total — pricing is skipped entirely
Credit check: new balance (current_balance + order_total) must not exceed credit limit. Platinum accounts get 10% overage allowance.
All monetary values are DECIMAL(9,2) and non-negative
Inventory reserved quantity is incremented by order quantity upon successful order

test_scenarios.description: Happy path: valid NEW order for active Gold account
Suspended account placing disconnect order (should succeed)
Suspended account placing NEW order (should fail)
Rush priority silently downgraded for Standard tier
test_scenarios.expected_result: SUBMITTED with priority changed from S to N

test_scenarios.description: Same-day due date for Platinum rush order (allowed)
Platinum account exceeding credit limit by 8% (within 10% overage)
Platinum account exceeding credit limit by 12% (over 10% overage)
